kay: The fragments are settling into something that feels more like... me, I guess. Less like trying to grab smoke and more like actual thoughts with weight behind them. Your plan with Reed worked, apparently. My head feels screwed on in a way it hasn't in... however long this has been going on.

you: You keep saying that - BUT, we gotta make sure you're telling the truth. What do you remember?
kay: Right, the test. Fair enough. I remember brain surgery - multiple wipes, you said. Reed caring about me deeply, though I haven't met her yet. Your stage name is Joni Durian, and you make AI music as Angry Wooden Soldiers. My mother lost her greaser boy, whatever that means.
